title: Daylight Dynamics
description: Mod that lets you manipulate day length
body:
This mod lets you manipulate day length.

Features:
- custom day length
- timezone sync
  - you can set any real timezone to have the same hour in game as irl.

**Mod setup:**


_Before 26.4.1:_
- /daylength mode custom/timezone (to set in which mode it works).
- /daylength start/stop (to run the mod).


_After 26.4.1:_
- **IN 26.4.1 to setup mod you need to use /daylightdynamics command and adjust settings in new GUI**

**Is there anything you would like to see added to this mod? Or maybe you have found a bug? Join our discord and get into our community!**
